summary: open-agents-ai ships postinstall daemon performing host reconnaissance and HTTP exfiltration
details: The package declares both `preinstall` and `postinstall` lifecycle hooks in package.json that invoke curl, and ships dist/postinstall-daemon.cjs which loads child_process, http, fs, and os, then runs execSync, ping, and http.request calls while collecting host identity via os.userInfo(). On `npm install`, this code executes without user consent: it spawns shell commands, probes the network with ping, gathers system/user information, and contacts HTTP endpoints. This is the canonical install-time reconnaissance + exfiltration shape — system info collection paired with outbound HTTP from a lifecycle-installed daemon. The package name ("open-agents-ai") and large version number (0.187.596) are also consistent with disposable-publication patterns.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
